message.part1: In order to log in and install your games, you first need to follow the steps below:

epic.step1: Open the Epic Store login page in your browser, log in to your account and copy your authorization code (Session ID).
epic.step2: Paste your authorization code in the input box below and click on the login button.
epic.label: Epic Session ID (SID)

gog.step1: Open the GOG login page in your browser and log in to your account.
gog.step2: After logging in, copy the entire URL from your browser's address bar and paste it in the input box below.
gog.label: GOG Authorization URL or Code

amazon.step1: Open the Amazon Games login page in your browser and log in to your account.
amazon.step2: After logging in, copy the entire URL from your browser's address bar and paste it in the input box below.
amazon.label: Amazon Authorization URL

error.invalid_code: Could not extract authorization code. Please paste the complete redirect URL.
error.code_too_short: Code is too short or invalid
error.login_failed: Login failed. Please try again or use the standard login method.
error.no_pkce: Login data missing. Please try again.
